core_mechanism: representing the exact joint probability distribution over a many-component system's configurations as an ordered product of non-commuting matrices (one factor per component) contracted between boundary vectors, where a local algebra among the matrices encodes the update rules and reduces global observables to matrix-algebra computations
brief_reason: The abstract centers on models whose exact steady-state distribution of microstates can be written in a matrix product form, using this construction to compute macroscopic quantities and prove existence of such states.
